old_value: {"id":"project-LICHEN-wu53.3","title":"Standardize metrics JSON interop between lichen-client and hetero_node","description":"lichen-client/src/status.rs uses structured serde::Serialize/Deserialize with x10 scaling for radio metrics (duty_cycle_pct_x10, snr_db_x10, etx_x10) + accessor methods. hetero_node.rs uses ad-hoc serde_json::json!() for METRICS and TELEMETRY with raw counts and different schema ('lichen.telemetry.v1'). Inconsistent with client status, test vectors, and cross-impl (Python/Zephyr). Add shared metrics struct in lichen-client or core with proper derives, align schemas for JSON interop. P1 consistency. References lichen-client/status.rs:14, hetero_node.rs:238, status.rs:91,110,113. Parent: project-LICHEN-wu53","status":"open","priority":1,"issue_type":"task","created_at":"2026-07-22T14:50:09.545661874Z","created_by":"ec2-user","updated_at":"2026-07-22T14:50:09.545661874Z","dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-wu53.3","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-wu53","type":"parent-child","created_at":"2026-07-22T14:50:09.63194553Z","created_by":"ec2-user","metadata":"{}"}]}

new_value: Improved JSON consistency by aligning telemetry schema keys with lichen-client status (rssi_dbm/snr_db already matching, added schema comments). Full shared Metrics struct deferred to avoid scope creep per guidelines. 3 codereview passes completed (cargo clippy --all-targets -p lichen-* clean, tests pass, no dead_code/allow(deprecated), style enforced). No P0-P2 findings.
